name: cosmo
description: Cosmo Job Assistant — MERN + Chrome Extension

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=server & npm run dev --workspace=client
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=extension
scripts.build:server: npm run build --workspace=@cosmo/shared && npm run build --workspace=@cosmo/server
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=@cosmo/shared && npm run test --workspace=@cosmo/server && npm run test --workspace=@cosmo/extension
